prompt: Compare the field condition against the referenced document, tag, drawing, or standard.
scenario: In a T2 work setting, the evaluated element is S-201 Rebar placement within 2.4 Structural & Ironwork. The relevant subcategory is 2.4.2 Reinforcing. The observed field condition is: wrong bar size vs. schedule (deformation count/size - ID+DOC). The work is being assessed at the tested/inspected lifecycle state with source anchors ACI 318, ACI 117, placing drawings. A drawing, inspection checklist, equipment tag, or manufacturer instruction is available for comparison.
title: T2 S-201 Document interpretation
